all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
He will swallow up death in victory; and the Lord God will wipe away tears from off all faces; and the rebuke of his people shall he take away from off all the earth: for the Lord hath spoken it.
Isaiah 25:8
Quote of the Day
"Embedded in the Good News Recipe is the “secret ingredient” to ensure you always get it right. … The answer is always Jesus Christ."
Elder John D. Amos | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
